text:
HEPVIRAL_COMBINED Hepatitis (Any Viral) - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 HEPVIRAL_MEDICAID Hepatitis (Any Viral) - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 HEPVIRAL_MEDICARE Hepatitis (Any Viral) - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met
